name: create_pull_zone
description: Create a new CDN pull zone that caches and delivers content from your origin server. Configure caching rules, SSL, and edge locations.

parameters.name: Name
parameters.description: The name of the pull zone. Must be unique across all Bunny CDN users and will form part of the CDN hostname.

parameters.name: OriginUrl
parameters.description: The origin URL where the CDN will pull content from when not cached.

parameters.name: StorageZoneId
parameters.description: The ID of a storage zone to use as the origin instead of an external URL.

parameters.name: EnableGeoZoneUS
parameters.description: Whether to enable US edge servers for this pull zone.

parameters.name: EnableGeoZoneEU
parameters.description: Whether to enable European edge servers for this pull zone.
